<!--
  Thank you for contributing! Please follow Conventional Commits in the PR title.
  Example: feat(ci): add SBOM generation step
  Types:   feat | fix | docs | refactor | perf | test | build | ci | chore | revert
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat   — new feature
- [ ] fix    — bug fix
- [ ] docs   — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — no behaviour change
- [ ] perf   — performance
- [ ] test   — tests only
- [ ] build  — build system / dependencies
- [ ] ci     — CI configuration
- [ ] chore  — housekeeping

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `yamllint` locally and it passes.
- [ ] I bumped all pinned action SHAs if I upgraded an action.
- [ ] I considered whether this change needs a `SECURITY.md` update.
- [ ] I considered whether this change needs a README update.
- [ ] The PR title follows Conventional Commits (`feat(scope): ...`).

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify the change? Paste links to CI runs if possible. -->

## Breaking changes

<!-- Describe any behaviour change that may break consumer repositories. -->
